name: Faved
short_desc: Self-hosted bookmark manager with customisable nested tags, auto-fetched metadata, and PWA support.
description: A private, open-source bookmark manager built for large collections and advanced use cases. Organize bookmarks with customisable nested tags, automatic title/description/preview fetching, duplicate detection, bulk actions, and flexible layouts (card/list/table). Installable as a PWA. Import from Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge, Raindrop.io, and Pocket. Chrome extension and bookmarklet available. All data stored locally in SQLite — no external dependencies.
author: denho
